arts.ttl: Donnarumma discontent at PSG: Contract renewal on hold, return to Italy possible
arts.sum: Gianluigi Donnarumma’s situation at Paris Saint-Germain is becoming increasingly tense. The Italian national team captain is struggling to tolerate Luis Enrique’s recent decisions, which have seen him benched for crucial matches. Calciomercato report how Donnarumma’s first exclusion of the season against Lens before the international break was taken in stride. However, being left out against Toulouse after the break and, more significantly, for the crucial Champions League match against Bayern Munich (which PSG lost 1-0) has sparked discontent. According to reports, Donnarumma is unhappy in Paris. arts.ttl: Coach Luis Enrique feels 'super confident' despite PSG's Champions League struggles
arts.sum: The position in the Champions League table is not deserved, we should have nine points,” Enrique said Friday ahead of Saturday’s French league game against Nantes. The immediate decisions facing Enrique are whether to stick with error-prone goalkeeper Gianluigi Donnarumma and how to reinvigorate misfiring forward Randal Kolo Muani.
